title: Thread Debugger
description: Single-thread investigation dashboard. Enter a thread_key to inspect all logs, lifecycle events, tool calls, and firewall audit for that thread.

panels.title: All Events Timeline
panels.description: All log lines across all services for this thread.

panels.title: Request Flow
panels.description: Key lifecycle events across Slackbot, API, and sandbox: mention → spawn → buffer → queue → SSE → turn → execute → deliver.

targets.expr: thread_key:${thread_key} AND (event:mention_received OR event:assignment_ready OR event:spawn_completed OR event:message_buffered OR event:message_stored OR event:execute_start OR event:execute_queued OR event:execute_claimed OR event:execute_started OR event:sse_connect OR event:turn_start OR event:sandbox_spawned OR event:sandbox_attached OR event:sandbox_stdin_write OR event:turn_first_output OR event:turn_done OR event:execute_complete OR event:execute_completed OR event:final_delivery_claimed OR event:final_delivery_started OR event:final_delivery_delivered OR event:final_delivery_completed OR event:final_delivery_failed OR event:sse_disconnect OR event:thread_released OR event:execution_cancel_requested)

panels.title: Errors & Warnings
panels.description: Only error and warning logs for this thread.

targets.expr: thread_key:${thread_key} AND (level:error OR level:warning OR level:warn)

panels.title: Tool Calls
panels.description: All tool calls for this thread with success/failure status.

panels.title: Firewall Audit
panels.description: All outbound HTTP requests from the sandbox for this thread.

panels.title: Slackbot Flow
panels.description: Slack-side lifecycle: mention → execute → stream → deliver.

panels.title: Execution Lifecycle
panels.description: API-side execution flow: queued → claimed → started → completed plus summaries.

targets.expr: thread_key:${thread_key} AND (event:spawn_completed OR event:message_stored OR event:execute_queued OR event:execute_claimed OR event:execute_started OR event:execute_completed OR event:execution_summary OR event:watchdog_timeout OR event:turn_done)

panels.title: Agent And Subagents
panels.description: Projected agent-level activity: tool use, subagents, commands, reasoning, and execution summaries.

targets.expr: thread_key:${thread_key} AND (event:assistant_tool_use_observed OR event:tool_result_observed OR event:subagent_status_observed OR event:command_execution_observed OR event:reasoning_observed OR event:assistant_text_observed OR event:usage_observed OR event:execution_summary)

panels.title: Delivery Lifecycle
panels.description: Final delivery handoff from API outbox to Slackbot and back.

targets.expr: thread_key:${thread_key} AND (event:final_delivery_ready OR event:final_delivery_claimed OR event:final_delivery_started OR event:final_delivery_delivered OR event:final_delivery_completed OR event:final_delivery_failed OR event:final_delivery_ack_failed OR event:final_delivery_post_failed OR event:final_delivery_suppressed)
